LanguageData.Ammo_NerveSpikerBolt.label: nerve spiker bolt
LanguageData.Ammo_NerveSpikerBolt.description: A heavy bioferrite bolt, shaped to be fired from a nerve spiker.\n\nThough simple to make, these bolts are brittle and tend to deform or break on impact.
LanguageData.Projectile_NerveSpikerBolt.label: nerve spiker bolt
